title: Epic RPG: InCombat
description: Restricts placing blocks while in combat mode is activated.
body:
Epic RPG: In Combat
An immersive combat system that restricts key actions while the player is in combat. Inspired by MMORPG mechanics, this mod blocks certain actions when the player is marked as "in combat."

Perfect for role-playing servers, intense adventures, or risk-based progression. Modular and configurable.

🛡️ Combat status is activated upon receiving or dealing damage.

🚫 Blocks actions such as placing blocks.

🔧 Configurable mod.
